title: Airstrike attack on infrastructure
title_en: Airstrike attack on infrastructure
title_uk: Авіаудар по інфраструктурі
description: The Armed Forces hit the infrastructure of the Russian Federation Hit: ▪️ oil pumping station "Krymskaya" (Krasnodar region) - with a fire ▪️ SAM "Tor-M1" ▪️ warehouses of the BC, BpLA and logistics in the occupied territories Also recorded were strikes on objects in the Donetsk and Luhansk regions. Minus fuel. Air defense minus. Minus peaceful night.
description_en: The Armed Forces hit the infrastructure of the Russian Federation Hit: ▪️ oil pumping station "Krymskaya" (Krasnodar region) - with a fire ▪️ SAM "Tor-M1" ▪️ warehouses of the BC, BpLA and logistics in the occupied territories Also recorded were strikes on objects in the Donetsk and Luhansk regions. Minus fuel. Air defense minus. Minus peaceful night.
description_uk: ВСУ ударили по инфраструктуре рф Поражены: ▪️ нефтеперекачивающая станция "Крымская" (Краснодарский край) - с пожаром ▪️ ЗРК "Тор-М1" ▪️ склады БК, БпЛА и логистики на оккупированных территориях Также зафиксированы удары по объектам в Донецкой и Луганской областях. Минус топливо. Минус ПВО. Минус спокойная ночь.

title: If sanctions on Russian oil were lifted because of the war in the...

description: If sanctions on Russian oil were lifted because of the war in the Middle East, will US sanctions be reimposed now that there is a ceasefire? I think the answer to this question will reveal the real reason for their cancellation. We just have to wait and see. In my opinion, Russia has once again deceived the Americans - deceived the President of the United States. The Russians lied about the role of their oil...
description_en: If sanctions on Russian oil were lifted because of the war in the Middle East, will US sanctions be reimposed now that there is a ceasefire? I think the answer to this question will reveal the real reason for their cancellation. We just have to wait and see. In my opinion, Russia has once again deceived the Americans - deceived the President of the United States. The Russians lied about the role of their oil...
description_uk: Якщо санкції проти російської нафти були зняті через війну на Близькому Сході, чи будуть санкції США знову запроваджені тепер, коли є припинення вогню? Я думаю, що відповідь на це запитання покаже справжню причину їхнього скасування. Нам треба лише почекати й побачити. На мою думку, Росія знову обманула американців – обманула Президента Сполучених Штатів. Росіяни збрехали про роль своїх нафтових...

title: Today we are with our communities. The meeting of the Congress of...
title_en: Today we are with our communities. The meeting of the Congress of...
title_uk: Сьогодні ми з нашими громадами. Засідання Конгресу...
description: Today we are with our communities. The meeting of the Congress of local and regional authorities was attended by our government officials and parliamentarians. Also here, in Transcarpathia, there was a meeting with our Ukrainian-Hungarian community. It is important that there is attention and respect for all communities in Ukraine. First of all, I thanked every community that was active and efficient this winter. We got through this winter thanks to all our people,...
description_en: Today we are with our communities. The meeting of the Congress of local and regional authorities was attended by our government officials and parliamentarians. Also here, in Transcarpathia, there was a meeting with our Ukrainian-Hungarian community. It is important that there is attention and respect for all communities in Ukraine. First of all, I thanked every community that was active and efficient this winter. We got through this winter thanks to all our people,...
description_uk: Сьогодні ми з нашими громадами. Зустріч Конгресу місцевих та регіональних влад – були наші урядовці, парламентарі брали участь. Також тут, на Закарпатті, була зустріч із нашою українською угорською громадою. Важливо, що є увага й повага для всіх спільнот в Україні. Передусім я подякував кожній громаді, яка була цією зимою активною та була ефективною. Ми пройшли цю зиму завдяки всім нашим людям,...

description: Defender of Mariupol and combat medic Tetyana "Khreshchena" Teplyuk got her own apartment on her 74th birthday. The house was provided to her under the "Home" program, which is implemented by the Rinat Akhmetov Foundation in partnership with "Heart of Azovstal". "Such an extraordinary gift! I am very grateful," says the servicewoman. Tatyana has been serving in "Azov" since 2015. During the full-scale war, she rescued the wounded in...
description_en: Defender of Mariupol and combat medic Tetyana "Khreshchena" Teplyuk got her own apartment on her 74th birthday. The house was provided to her under the "Home" program, which is implemented by the Rinat Akhmetov Foundation in partnership with "Heart of Azovstal". "Such an extraordinary gift! I am very grateful," says the servicewoman. Tatyana has been serving in "Azov" since 2015. During the full-scale war, she rescued the wounded in...
description_uk: Захисниця Маріуполя та бойова медикиня Тетяна «Хрещена» Теплюк отримала власну квартиру у свій 74-ий День народження. Оселю їй надали за програмою «Вдома», яку Фонд Ріната Ахметова реалізує у партнерстві з «Серцем Азовсталі». «Такий надзвичайний подарунок! Я дуже вдячна», – каже військовослужбовиця. Тетяна з 2015 року служить в «Азові». Під час повномасштабної війни рятувала поранених у...

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
title_uk: Активна ППО
description: The Russians demonstrated the use of the new Geran-5 jet drone on objects in the Sumy region. Due to the high speed and design, such devices are more difficult to intercept by means of air defense.
description_en: The Russians demonstrated the use of the new Geran-5 jet drone on objects in the Sumy region. Due to the high speed and design, such devices are more difficult to intercept by means of air defense.
description_uk: Россияне показали применение нового реактивного дрона "Герань-5" по объектам в Сумской области Сообщается, что дрон оснащён турбореактивным двигателем, развивает скорость до 650 км/ч, имеет дальность до 1000 км и боевую часть около 90 кг. Из-за высокой скорости и конструкции такие аппараты сложнее перехватывать средствами ПВО.

description: At least 2 killed, 23 injured in Russian attacks on Ukraine over past day. Russian forces launched 119 drones against Ukraine overnight, of which almost 70 were Shahed-type drones, the Air Force said. Photo: Ukraine's Emergency Service

title: Donetsk: Drone incoming
title_en: Donetsk: Drone incoming
title_uk: Донецьк: Дрон вхід
description: 99 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 9 (from 18:00 on April 8), the enemy attacked 119 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and drones of other types from the directions: Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea, Donetsk, about 70 of them - "shahedis". The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and unmanned aerial vehicles...
description_en: 99 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 9 (from 18:00 on April 8), the enemy attacked 119 attack UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and drones of other types from the directions: Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea, Donetsk, about 70 of them - "shahedis". The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and unmanned aerial vehicles...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 99 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА У ніч на 9 квітня (з 18:00 8 квітня) противник атакував 119 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та безпілотниками інших типів із напрямків: Брянськ, Курськ, Орел, Міллерово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., Гвардійське – ТОТ АР Крим, Донецьк, близько 70 із них – "шахеди". Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних...
